name: Ui.Button

unions.name: ButtonColor
unions.comment:
Defines the available button colors

  - `Primary`: used to get users main focus
  - `Secondary`: used as an accent to `Primary`
  - `Warn`: used to indicate a destructive and/or dangerous action

unions.name: ButtonContent
unions.comment: Defins the content of the button

unions.name: ButtonEmphasis
unions.comment: Defines the emphasis of the button

values.name: customView
values.comment:
Returns a custom view of a button.
Only use this when `view` is not enough.
values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> { onClick : Maybe.Maybe msg, color : Ui.Button.ButtonColor, emphasis : Ui.Button.ButtonEmphasis } -> Ui.Button.ButtonContent -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: view
values.comment:
Returns a view of a button
This should be used whenever possible.
You can use `customView` if you need to
customize the button.
values.type: { onClick : Maybe.Maybe msg, color : Ui.Button.ButtonColor, emphasis : Ui.Button.ButtonEmphasis } -> Ui.Button.ButtonContent -> Html.Styled.Html msg

name: Ui.Icon

values.name: chevronLeft
values.comment: Chevron left icon

values.name: chevronRight
values.comment: Chevron right icon

values.name: close
values.comment: Close icon

values.name: edit
values.comment: Edit icon

values.name: search
values.comment: Search icon

values.name: setFill
values.comment: Set a fill color for the given icon

values.name: view
values.comment: Creates a view for the given icon

name: Ui.MillerColumns
comment:
This module defines a component of a miller column layout

@docs Model, Content, Msg, init, setFocus, setSearch, view, update

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Internal messages to update the state of the component

aliases.name: Content
aliases.comment:
The content of each list item

`leftAlignedText` Takes a value of a and gives back a String that is shown to the left of each list item

`mRightAlignedText` Takes a value of a and gives back a String that is shown to the right of each list item
aliases.type: { leftAlignedText : a -> String.String, mRightAlignedText : Maybe.Maybe (a -> String.String) }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment:
Model of the component

`treeZipper` the data displayed in the miller columns. The zipper has a single focus at any time.
`state` internal state of the component. 
    - If the state is in `Focus` it will show the zipper in miller columns
    - If the state is in `Search` it will list all the values that contains the searched value
aliases.type: { treeZipper : Tree.Zipper.Zipper ( Ui.MillerColumns.ListItemId, v ), state : Ui.MillerColumns.State v }

values.name: init
values.comment: Initializes a model given a Tree of a

values.name: setFocus
values.comment: Focus on the zipper tree

values.name: setSearch
values.comment:
Display the search results of the values in the zipper
`searchValue` the value we are searching for in the tree structure
`searchOn` given a value in the tree it returns the string we want to search on with the `searchValue`
values.type: String.String -> (v -> String.String) -> Ui.MillerColumns.Model v -> Ui.MillerColumns.Model v

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the model of the Miller Columns
values.type: Ui.MillerColumns.Msg -> Ui.MillerColumns.Model v -> ( Ui.MillerColumns.Model v, Platform.Cmd.Cmd Ui.MillerColumns.Msg )

values.name: view
values.comment: View the Miller Columns
values.type: { liftMsg : Ui.MillerColumns.Msg -> msg } -> Ui.MillerColumns.Model v -> Ui.MillerColumns.Content v -> Html.Styled.Html msg

name: Ui.Pagination

values.name: currentPage
values.comment: Returns the current page number

values.name: customView
values.comment:
Returns a custom view of a pagination component.
Only use this when `view` is not enough.
values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute Basics.Never) -> Ui.Pagination.Model -> { siblingCount : Basics.Int, boundaryCount : Basics.Int, onNav : Ui.Pagination.Model -> msg } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg

values.name: getInitial
values.comment: Return the left range [1,current page - 1] of the current page

values.name: getTail
values.comment: Return the right range [current page + 1, number of pages] of the current page

values.name: init
values.comment: Creates a model for the component

values.name: nextPage
values.comment: Go to the next page

values.name: previousPage
values.comment: Go to the previous page

values.name: setPage
values.comment: Set the current page

values.name: view
values.comment:
Returns a view of a pagination component.
This should be used whenever possible.
You can use `customView` if you need to
customize the button.
values.type: Ui.Pagination.Model -> { siblingCount : Basics.Int, boundaryCount : Basics.Int, onNav : Ui.Pagination.Model -> msg } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg

name: Ui.RadioButton

values.name: customView
values.comment:
Returns a custom view of a radio button group.
Only use this when `view` is not enough.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute Basics.Never) -> { onChange : a -> msg, options : List.List { optionLabel : String.String, value : a, disabled : Basics.Bool }, label : String.String, selected : Maybe.Maybe a, direction : Ui.RadioButton.Direction } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg

values.name: view
values.comment:
Return a view of a radio button group.
This should be used whenever possible.
You can use `customView` if you need to
customize the button.
values.type: { onChange : a -> msg, options : List.List { optionLabel : String.String, value : a, disabled : Basics.Bool }, label : String.String, selected : Maybe.Maybe a, direction : Ui.RadioButton.Direction } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg
